ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the song was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the song was last updated */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the song */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the song contains explicit content */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "playback_url" TEXT /* URL for the song's audio file */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL for the song's cover art */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "photo" TEXT /* Photo of the artist */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for contacting the artist */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the artist's official website */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist or band was formed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the artist (city, country) */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON field for additional social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, artist, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL for the user's profile picture */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country of residence */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_streams" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stream event */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being streamed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user streaming the song */,
  "stream_date" TEXT /* Date the song was streamed */,
  "stream_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song was streamed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for streaming */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location during streaming */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* User's IP address during streaming */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_streams_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_streams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue event */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song generating revenue */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of revenue generated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the revenue was generated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the revenue (e.g., streaming, download, ad revenue) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the revenue amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating event */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text field for the user's review of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_ratings_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_socials" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media entry */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Handle of the artist on the platform */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the artist's social media profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_socials_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)
